chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.1102 of 2025 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ Disposed of matter 1. For orders on M.A. No.6654/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on M.A. No.6655/2025 (Return of surety) ------------------------------ 14.05.2025 Mr. Raheem Bux, advocate for applicant/surety Ms. Amna Ansari, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh ------------------------------------------------- Along with urgent application, application for return of surety is moved by applicant/surety. It appears that protective bail was granted to applicants/accused Syed Nasir Hussain and Mst. Ghazala Yaseen by this Court vide order dated 02.05.2025, subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.25,000/- each and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court. As per endorsement of Nazir, one Syed Umair son of Syed Sajid ALi Jaffri Manzoor furnished surety for applicants by way of depositing cash Rs.50,000/-. Counsel for applicant/surety submits that the applicants surrendered before the trial Court, faced trial, the parties have amicably settled their issue and applicants/ accused were acquitted of the charge vide order dated 03.05.2025. Certified copy of order dated 03.05.2025 passed in Criminal Case No.800/2025 is placed on record. Learned Additional Prosecutor General Sindh present in Court in some other cases waives notice and after having gone through the case file and order dated 03.05.2025 of the trial Court has recorded no objection for return of surety.

Certified copy of order dated 03.05.2025 passed in Criminal Case No.800/2025 is placed on record. Learned Additional Prosecutor General Sindh present in Court in some other cases waives notice and after having gone through the case file and order dated 03.05.2025 of the trial Court has recorded no objection for return of surety. In the view of above, surety is no more required. Application for return of surety is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety to the applicant/surety upon proper verification and identification, as per rules. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
